definitions: 咯咯地笑；发出刺耳的笑声（cackle）

examples.text: landing in a far-off region where five pink pillars seemed to mark the edge of the Heavens. Cackling with glee, Sun Wukong proudly marked his territory. Returning to the Buddha, he demanded his new title— but he was distracted by a familiar odor.
examples.explanation: 这里 “Cackling with glee” 表示孙悟空“高兴得咯咯笑着 / 得意地怪笑着”，cackle 强调笑声尖锐、刺耳或带有得意感。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
